summary: Full polish testing of Monitoring & Analytics Dashboard - All 3 tiers verified. 23 backend tests passed, all frontend features working correctly including WebSocket with polling fallback, theme toggle, widget customization, and export functionality.

success_rate.backend: 100% (23/23 tests passed - 11 original + 12 new polish tests)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 tiers of polish features are working. WebSocket connects but falls back to polling in test environment (expected behavior). Theme and widget preferences persist in localStorage. Export buttons are functional.

tier_1_features.notes: Alert banner shows '1 Critical Alert' when thresholds exceeded
Shows 'Updated: HH:MM:SS AM/PM' and updates every 5 seconds
Skeleton grid visible during loading state

tier_2_features.notes: WebSocket connects and sends realtime data every 1 second
Falls back to 5-second polling when WebSocket disconnects
Shows green LIVE badge for WebSocket, blue POLLING for fallback
Red drift cards have alert-pulse animation class

tier_2_features.feature: Mini sparklines in Engine Performance tab
tier_2_features.notes: Sparkline table shows recent trends for each engine
Shows '🟢 Real Metrics (psutil)' with green indicator
Shows '⚡ WebSocket' or '🔄 Polling (5s)' in System Health tab

tier_3_features.notes: Widget toggles persist in localStorage as 'analytics-widgets'
Opens with ⚙️ button, contains theme, widgets, and export sections

responsive_design.notes: Tabs stack vertically, stats cards stack, gauges single column
Full grid layout with all widgets visible

backend_api_tests.notes: Returns psutil_available: true with real metrics
Returns timestamp for Last Updated feature
Sends realtime updates with stats and health data

websocket_behavior.note: WebSocket connects successfully but may fall back to polling in certain network conditions. This is expected behavior - the fallback mechanism works correctly.
